title: What is a crystal bowl sound bath?
meta_description: A crystal bowl sound bath centers quartz singing bowls: clear, sustained, glass-like tones you lie down and listen to. What the bowls actually are, how they differ from metal bowls, and an honest note on the word crystal.
breadcrumb: What is a crystal bowl sound bath?
